name: Google Workspace Stale Active Accounts (365 days)
description: Detects active Google Workspace accounts with no login activity for at least 365 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.last_login_time AS last_login FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND (u.last_login_time IS NULL OR u.last_login_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Disable long-dormant accounts and require formal approval before any reactivation.
